query: SELECT id, title, image_url, category_id FROM gallery_images ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user reQhEQm8VKDhmxs.root --database TPXNrRKBQNE8qaxNyKenmM --execute SELECT id, title, image_url, category_id FROM gallery_images ORDER BY id;
